chapter_title.ar: بَابُ النَّهْيِ عَنِ الصِّفَةِ بِغَيْرِ مَا وَصَفَ بِهِ نَفْسَهُ تَعَالَى
chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – The Forbiddance from describing with other than what He<sup>azwj</sup> has Described Himself<sup>azwj</sup> with

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/350)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/350)
text: أَخْبَرَنِي هَارُونُ بْنُ الْجَهْمِ عَنْ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ قَالَ لَوِ اجْتَمَعَ أَهْلُ السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ أَنْ يَصِفُوا اللَّهَ بِعَظَمَتِهِ لَمْ يَقْدِرُوا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad and Muhammad Bin Al Hassan, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Bashir Al Barqy who said, ‘Abbas Bin Aamir Al Qasbany narrated to me saying, ‘Haroun Bin Al Jahm informed me, from Abu Hamza,

(It has been narrated) from Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If the inhabitants of the sky and the earth were to gather together in describing Allah<sup>azwj</sup> by His<sup>azwj</sup> Magnificence, they would not be able to’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Muhammad and Muhammad ibn al-Hassan have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Bashir al-Barqi who has said that ‘Abbass ibn ‘Amir al-Qasbani who has said that Harun ibn al-Juham from abu Hamza from Imam Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) has reported the following. “Even if all those in heavens and earth would gather together to speak of the greatness of Allah they will not be able to do so.”
